HGSS.378.0000:
Lyra: Grandma!\f
Let me introduce my friend.
This is [0103,0000,0000]!\f
HGSS.378.0001:
Ah ha.
This is your boy...friend.\r
I see. Hmm.\f
HGSS.378.0002:
Lyra: What? Grandma...!
What are you talking about?\f
He just happens to live nearby...\f
HGSS.378.0003:
Grandma: Hahaha.
I know. I know.\f
Since you brought him here, Lyra, you
must be sure about his talent.\f
Right, [0103,0000,0000]?
Come and see us anytime!\f
HGSS.378.0004:
Lyra: Well, I better go now...
See ya!\f
HGSS.378.0006:
Lyra: Here!
This is my Pokégear number!\f
HGSS.378.0008:
Lyra: You know you can talk to your
Pokémon as they follow you?\f
They do all sorts of cute stuff on the
road and in towns.\f
I’m taking notes every time they do
funny things.\f
Give me a call and I’ll share some of
them with you.\f
HGSS.378.0009:
Lyra: Grandma!\f
Don’t you say anything.\f
We are both Trainers, and we are
supposed to exchange numbers.\r
That’s all.\f

I see. Hmm.\f

Ethan: What? Grandma...!
What are you talking about?\f

I know. I know.\f
